name: Mezzeluna
tagline: Authentic Greek cooking in the heart of Cotati
seoDescription: Mezzeluna is a chef-owned Greek restaurant in Cotati, CA serving traditional Hellenic dishes — moussaka, souvlaki, gyros, and house spanakopita — made with California-sourced ingredients, with vegan, vegetarian and gluten-free options.
heroSubheading: A chef-owned Greek kitchen in downtown Cotati, where Istanbul-rooted technique meets California ingredients.
highlights: Chef-owned, with deep Greek and Mediterranean roots
Vegan, vegetarian and gluten-free options on every menu
Lunch and dinner, six days a week
aboutBody: Named for the crescent moon, Mezzeluna brings authentic Greek cooking to downtown Cotati. Chef and co-founder Ali Çetin grew up in a family of chefs in Istanbul, trained internationally, and completed his culinary studies at Santa Rosa Junior College before opening the restaurant — pairing time-honored Hellenic recipes with the produce and spirit of Sonoma County.

The kitchen leans on the staples of the Greek table — olive oil, feta, fresh herbs, and honey — to build a menu that welcomes everyone. Vegan, vegetarian and gluten-free dishes sit comfortably alongside the classics, and a short list of Greek wines rounds out the meal.

services.title: Spanakopita
services.description: House-made spinach and feta baked in crisp, flaky phyllo — a Greek classic and a regular starter.

services.title: Moussaka
services.description: Layered eggplant, potato and seasoned meat under a rich bechamel, baked until golden.

services.title: Souvlaki
services.description: Marinated, char-grilled skewers served the traditional way with warm pita and tzatziki.

services.title: Gyros
services.description: Slow-roasted, seasoned meat carved to order and wrapped with fresh vegetables and house tzatziki.

services.title: Mezze & Appetizers
services.description: Tzatziki, dolmades, kalamari and other small plates meant for sharing around the table.

services.title: Baklava & Greek Sweets
services.description: Honey-soaked phyllo and other traditional desserts to finish the meal.

team.name: Ali Çetin
team.bio: Raised in a family of chefs in Istanbul, Ali trained internationally before completing culinary studies at Santa Rosa Junior College and opening Mezzeluna.

notes: Facts verified from mezzeluna.com/about, Sonoma Magazine, and Sonoma State Star (Greek cuisine; owners Ali Cetin and Baki Bekci; 8099 La Plaza, Suite A, Cotati; (707) 992-0101). Trust signal: Tripadvisor 4.4/5 aggregate rating (cited as source). No verbatim review quote fabricated. Greek (not Italian) cuisine confirmed.
